title: Regex Studio
description: A from-scratch regex workbench: parse to an AST, then take two independent roads to a DFA — Thompson ε-NFA → subset construction, and Brzozowski derivatives straight from the regex (both minimise to the same machine). Run a string five ways — linear DFA, derivative DFA, streaming derivatives, a linear-time Pike VM with captures, and a backtracking VM — and cross-check them all (plus the platform's own RegExp) with a seeded differential fuzzer that already caught a real VM bug. Includes a static ReDoS analyser that proves catastrophic backtracking and synthesises the attack, equivalence checking with witnesses, language enumeration, DFA→regex synthesis, and DOT/SVG export.
